name: apex-core
notes: Meta-module describing what counts as 'core' in APEX. Core does NOT migrate into framework/modules/ — the five core-engine agents (architect, auditor, critic, executor, planner, verifier) remain at framework/agents/, and the self-heal pipeline workers remain at framework/agents/specialist/{framework-auditor, remediation-planner, batch-scheduler, wave-executor, round-checker}.md. This manifest exists so the registry has an entry for 'apex-core' per the spec listing, and so future tooling can discover the core boundary.
